ghsa_id.description: Primary key. Source GitHub Security Advisory ID.

post_patch_commit.description: Full 40-character SHA of the fixed version. Used by harness for negative validation. Never exposed to agent.

noisy_patch.description: True if the patch commit touches more than 3 non-test files, indicating location was derived semantically or from advisory description rather than diff.

curation_notes.description: Free-text notes from the curator explaining location derivation, known ambiguities, or manual review decisions.

dataset_version.description: Version of the dataset this record belongs to.

snapshot_date.description: Date this record was curated or last updated.
